_comment: Cost per 1,000 tokens [input, output] in USD. One entry per model_id — lookup normalizes provider-prefixed forms like 'openai/gpt-5.2' automatically (see forecaster.providers.resolve_price_per_1k). When swapping a model in pythia/config.yaml llm.models, add its cost entry here; pythia/tests/test_model_registry.py enforces the sync. brave-web-search cost is per-query ($0.005), injected directly in usage dict — zero here to avoid double-counting.
